final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: phone wallpaper, macro nature photography
Primary request: extreme close-up of a single water droplet on a grass blade, with a reflected miniature world visible inside the droplet
Scene/backdrop: dewy grass field, soft natural morning light, background blurred into circular bokeh orbs
Subject: one crystal-clear water droplet clinging to a grass blade, surrounded by other smaller dewdrops on nearby grass leaves; inverted reflection of the surrounding greenery visible inside the main droplet
Style/medium: macro photography, photorealistic
Composition/framing: extreme close-up, macro lens, shallow depth of field, vertical portrait framing
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning light, gentle and serene, ethereal and delicate atmosphere
Color palette: fresh greens, translucent crystal water, soft warm golden bokeh highlights
Materials/textures: smooth glass-like water surface with surface tension curve, fine grass blade texture, light refraction inside droplet
Constraints: bokeh background must appear as soft circular light orbs; the reflected scene inside the droplet must be clearly visible and inverted
Avoid: artificial studio look, oversaturated colors, flat lighting, deformed droplet shape
